channel.title: Beer TV - Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: “Beer America” Pilot/Idea, Part 2, 2004 – Ep. 118
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Part 2 of the Beer America TV “It was my idea first” episode is here! After shooting my Beer America screen test with Dogfish Head owner Sam Calagione in 2003, I found myself wanting to shoot something a little more in-depth to shop to networks like the Travel Channel. A&E, Discovery, Scripts etc . So […]

The post “Beer America” Pilot/Idea, Part 2, 2004 – Ep. 118 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: “Beer America” Pilot with Sam Calagione, 2003 – Ep. 117
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
LONG before Brew Masters, I wrote a TV show pilot simply called Beer America . At the time I worked for a company in Washington DC called O’Keefe Communications, I convinced them that this guy named Sam Calagione would be a great host for my little beer show and asked for their help to shoot […]

The post “Beer America” Pilot with Sam Calagione, 2003 – Ep. 117 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Delay in BATV Vlogs
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
I want to apologize for the delay in posting more beer vlogs! Since moving to Fort Worth Texas, I’ve been extremely busy with my full time paying gig . Before coming here however, we shot a bunch of new beers that I will roll out soon! Behind the scenes, I’ve been continually working on launching […]

The post Delay in BATV Vlogs first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: The Hops are Free in Alabama!!!
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Since our post on ABV limits was so popular and seemed to touch a nerve, I wanted to post an email from Tom Cale who has been very kind in keeping us up to date with the situation in Alabama. Thanks so much to all those who contributed to the conversation. Now we need to […]

The post The Hops are Free in Alabama!!! first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Beer Wars, did I miss something?
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
As the lights came up in the nearly empty theater I was sitting in, I felt like I had just seen a documentary made by a charmingly geeky executive formally of Mike’s Hard Lemonade who is allergic to alcohol. Now to be fair at the top, I give Anat Baron kudos for putting the time […]

The post Beer Wars, did I miss something? first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Beer America TV Brewing Network Segment
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
It was fun had by all, and the Brewing Network was kind enough to have BeerAmerica.TV on board for their Sunday Session on March 22, 2009. It was a 4 hour affair featuring our own John Pinkerton, David Little, Paul Leone and Chris Lady . Most of the talk revolved around Moon River Brewing and […]

The post Beer America TV Brewing Network Segment first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.
item.itunes:subtitle: It was fun had by all, and the Brewing Network was kind enough to have BeerAmerica.TV on board for their Sunday Session on March 22, 2009. It was a 4 hour affair featuring our own John Pinkerton, David Little, Paul Leone and Chris Lady . Most of [...]
item.itunes:summary: It was fun had by all, and the Brewing Network was kind enough to have BeerAmerica.TV on board for their Sunday Session on March 22, 2009. It was a 4 hour affair featuring our own John Pinkerton, David Little, Paul Leone and Chris Lady . Most of the talk revolved around Moon River Brewing and brewing techniques, but if you just want to hear the segment of BeerAmerica.TV, I have it for you here. If you’d like to hear the whole thing, go to the Brewing Networks website – http://www.thebrewingnetwork.com/ – and download the whole episode. A warning that the language is unedited, so be prepared. Many thanks again to the Brewing Network, who does a great job bringing brewing entertainment and info to the Craft beer loving universe! The post Beer America TV Brewing Network Segment first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!. The post Beer America TV Brewing Network Segment first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.
item.itunes:author: paul@beeramerica.tv

item.title: 2009…Here We Come!
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
In 2008 I launched BeerAmerica.TV as a way to get my love and creative passion for American Craft beer out to the masses who feel like I do, but the concept for BeerAmerica.TV was born many years ago. In 2003 I was traveling a lot doing shows for HGTV, and every city and town I […]

The post 2009…Here We Come! first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Brewing up a new site
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
As we continue to grow this site, we are smoothing out issues that periodically arise. We are currently in the process of changing out video players to Viddler and soon will be premiering a new cleaner look for easier navigation and room for more information based video already in production. By moving to Viddler, the Beeramerica.TV bug […]

The post Brewing up a new site first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.
